info.title: Workflow Service API
info.description: REST API for the Workflow Service – exposes available review workflow plugins and their rules.

get.description: Returns an array of all registered workflow plugins with their metadata and rules.

200.description: Successfully retrieved the list of workflow plugins

get.summary: Get details of a specific workflow plugin
get.description: Returns the metadata and rules for the workflow plugin identified by its name.

parameters.name: pluginName
parameters.description: The unique name of the workflow plugin

get.summary: Get the rules of a specific workflow plugin
get.description: Returns the anonymity and communication rules for the workflow plugin identified by its name.

parameters.name: pluginName
parameters.description: The unique name of the workflow plugin

get.summary: Get the rules for a specific submission
get.description: Returns the anonymity and communication rules for the workflow plugin associated with the given submission ID.

parameters.name: submissionId
parameters.description: The unique ID of the submission

200.description: Successfully retrieved the rules for the submission

404.description: Submission or workflow plugin not found

WorkflowRulesDto.description: The anonymity and communication rules of a workflow plugin

authorAnonymous.description: Whether the author's identity is hidden from reviewers

reviewerAnonymous.description: Whether the reviewer's identity is hidden from the author

authorReviewerChatAllowed.description: Whether direct chat between author and reviewer is allowed

WorkflowPluginDto.description: A registered workflow plugin with its metadata and rules

title.description: Human-readable title of the workflow plugin

name.description: Unique name of the workflow plugin

description.description: Human-readable description of the workflow plugin
